summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blendlink 11-point update. Fixed 1 bug (missing onEdit prop in ListingCard). 19/19 backend tests pass. All major features verified working. One critical issue found: /marketplace/:id route is protected, preventing guests from viewing listing details.

integration_issues.issue: /marketplace/:id route is wrapped in ProtectedRoute, redirecting guests to login instead of showing listing detail

fixed_during_testing.issue: TypeError: onEdit is not a function - missing onEdit prop in My Listings tab
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added onEdit={handleEditListing} prop to ListingCard in listings tab

action_items: CRITICAL: Make /marketplace/:id route public (remove ProtectedRoute wrapper) so guests can view listing details from Landing page
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 200: <Route path='/marketplace/:id' element={<ProtectedRoute><ListingDetail /></ProtectedRoute>} /> should be public for guest viewing
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboard.jsx (added onEdit prop to ListingCard in My Listings tab)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 11-point update testing complete. All backend APIs working (URL preview, language detection, PUT listings, BL coins for listings). Frontend features verified: Language selector on Landing/Settings, Checkout country dropdown, Photo Editor with upload spinner, Edit Listing modal, AI Listing Creator with 65 target countries. ONE CRITICAL FIX NEEDED: /marketplace/:id route must be made public for guest viewing.

feature_1_guest_view_landing.details: Landing page shows featured items with View button, but clicking redirects to login due to protected route

feature_2_cart_icon_link.details: Browse the Marketplace link shows correct text without 'guest' wording

feature_3_checkout_country_dropdown.details: Country dropdown shows filtered countries based on seller's target_countries (tested with 6 countries)

feature_4_photo_editor_spinner.details: Photo Editor modal opens with full functionality including AI background removal

feature_5_seller_dashboard_edit.details: Edit Listing button works, modal opens with all fields (Title, Description, Price, Condition, Status)

feature_6_put_listings_endpoint.details: PUT /api/marketplace/listings/{id} works correctly, tested via pytest

feature_7_bl_coins_for_listings.details: Creating listing awards 100 BL coins, verified via pytest

feature_10_language_selector.details: Language selector visible on Landing page (compact) and Settings page (full dropdown with search)

feature_11_target_market_countries.details: AI Listing Creator has 65 countries in TARGET_MARKET_COUNTRIES list
